title: RGB
description: Adds decorative, glowing RGB pixel blocks to the game.
body:
# RGB
##### By JG
![Close-up RGB blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7ddc4e86aa4246cf2cb16d456427b0d29bba41.jpeg)

## Custom Blocks
**This mod adds 8 new blocks** which you can combine together to create various **RGB/CMYK** color arrangments. Blocks are purely decorative.

Blocks include: Blue, Red, Green, Red/Green, Blue/Red, Green/Blue, Red/Green/Blue, Off.

### 256x Textures
**Supports labPBR shaders!**
